description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust and utilitarian design. The shotgun has a single, cylindrical barrel with a ribbed pump fore-end, which is used to chamber rounds. The stock is a full, straight design, providing stability and control, and is also finished in black. The receiver and trigger assembly are compact, with a rounded trigger guard that encloses the trigger. The overall length is moderate, making it suitable for close-quarters use, typical of urban environments. The surface appears hard and slightly textured, with minimal reflective qualities.
description: A matte black pump-action shotgun with a ribbed fore-end, single barrel, and full stock, designed for robust urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow, cylindrical barrel and ribbed pump fore-end.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, single barrel, ribbed pump, trigger guard, and full stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the stock and barrel clearly visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbed pump fore-end, no visible venting or barrel length variation
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
